testCases.title: Quick Order by SKU
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Valid SKU entry loads product: name, price, availability in row
testCases.notes: Manually tab accepts SKU and quantity entry; Add to cart enables after qty input. However, no inline product resolution occurs — row shows only the raw SKU text with no product name, image, unit price, or availability indicator. The Quantity field was always editable (not gated on product lookup). The Copy&Paste tab correctly resolves products and redirects to cart on Add to cart.

testCases.title: Invalid SKU Handling
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Row 2 shows error: 'Product not found' or 'Invalid SKU'
testCases.notes: In Copy&Paste mode, entering XKC-38084072,1 and FAKE-SKU-99999,1 then clicking Add to cart silently ignores the invalid SKU (FAKE-SKU-99999) and adds only the valid product. No per-row error or warning is shown. The Add to cart operation proceeded and valid items were added. The test asserts an error message scoped to the invalid row — this does not occur.

testCases.title: Bulk Order Quantity Validation
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] Add to Cart or Add All to Cart blocked for rows with invalid quantities
testCases.notes: In Manually tab, entering qty=0 in a row with a valid SKU does NOT disable the Add to cart button. The button remained enabled. No validation error message appeared for qty=0. The spinbutton has min=1 attribute but this is not enforced at the UI level to block submission.

testCases.title: Bulk Order — Duplicate SKU Across Rows Coalesces Into Single Cart Line
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Cart page shows exactly 1 row for the SKU (no duplicate lines)
testCases.notes: Entering ALCE0128,2 three times in Copy&Paste mode and clicking Add to cart resulted in two separate line items for ALCE0128 in the cart (both showing qty=11, which includes prior test items). The cart displayed two distinct rows for the same SKU rather than coalescing into a single line. BL-CART-007 violation: same SKU from bulk order should coalesce into one cart line.

testCases.title: Dashboard After First Login
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires a new user account with no prior orders. Test user (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) has existing orders and history. Creating a new account within the test run is out of scope per preflight protocol.

testCases.title: Notification Dropdown Opens
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires at least one notification to exist. Test user has no notifications; dropdown showed empty state 'No new notifications at the moment'.

testCases.title: Mark as Read
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires unread notification to exist. Test user has no notifications.

testCases.title: Unsubscribe from Alert
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: After subscribing in B2C-STOCK-002, the /account/back-in-stock list did not show the newly subscribed product on reload (subscription may require async processing). Unable to locate unsubscribe action for the test product.

testCases.title: Points After Order
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires placing a new order through checkout. [PRE:RESET_CART] required but placing a full checkout order is outside the scope of this run given time constraints and incomplete payment setup.

testCases.title: Notification Bell Badge - Unread Count
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires unread notifications. Test user has no unread notifications; bell shows no badge.

testCases.title: Notification Dropdown - View Recent
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires notifications to exist. Test user has no notifications.

testCases.title: Mark Individual Notification as Read
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires unread notifications. Test user has none.

testCases.title: Mark All Notifications as Read
testCases.notes: PRECONDITION_UNMET: Requires multiple unread notifications. Test user has none.

testCases.title: Bulk Order - CSV File Upload
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] File upload area or button visible on bulk order page
testCases.notes: The /bulk-order page has two modes: Copy&Paste (textarea for SKU,Qty text) and Manually (row-by-row SKU+qty entry). Neither mode offers a file upload control (drag-and-drop zone or file picker button). No file upload UI element found anywhere on the page.

testCases.title: Quick Order - SKU Autocomplete Suggestions
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Autocomplete dropdown appears after typing 3+ characters
testCases.notes: Typed 'XKC' (3 characters) into the SKU input field in Manually tab. No autocomplete dropdown or suggestion list appeared after 2 second wait. The field accepts freeform text only with no typeahead/suggestion functionality.

testCases.title: Quick Order - Non-Existent SKU Clear Error
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Error message displayed for non-existent SKU
testCases.notes: Tested in Copy&Paste mode (B2C-BULK-003 context): entering FAKE-SKU-99999,1 alongside a valid SKU and clicking Add to cart — the invalid SKU is silently skipped with no error message shown. In Manually tab, no real-time SKU validation or error indicator appears for unrecognized SKUs.

bugs.title: Bulk Order Manually Tab: No inline product resolution after SKU entry
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Valid SKU entry loads product: name, price, availability in row
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in as mutykovaelena@gmail.com. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order. 3. Click Manually tab. 4. Enter a valid SKU (e.g. XKC-38084072) in row 1. 5. Press Enter or Tab.
bugs.expected: Product name, image, unit price, and availability indicator appear in the row after SKU entry.
bugs.actual: Row shows only the typed SKU text and quantity spinbutton. No product info resolved. The Quantity field is immediately editable without product lookup.

bugs.title: Bulk Order: No error shown for invalid/non-existent SKU in Copy&Paste mode
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Row 2 shows error: 'Product not found' or 'Invalid SKU'
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order (Copy&Paste tab). 3. Enter 'XKC-38084072,1\nFAKE-SKU-99999,1' in the textarea. 4. Click Add to cart.
bugs.expected: A per-entry error (e.g. 'Product not found') is shown for FAKE-SKU-99999. Valid row is unaffected. Add to cart warns about or skips invalid entries visibly.
bugs.actual: No error shown. Page navigates to cart with only the valid product added. Invalid SKU silently discarded. User has no visibility into which entries failed.

bugs.title: Bulk Order Manually Tab: qty=0 does not block Add to cart
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] Add to Cart or Add All to Cart blocked for rows with invalid quantities
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order, Manually tab. 3. Enter valid SKU in row 1. 4. Set qty to 0. 5. Observe Add to cart button state.
bugs.expected: Add to cart button disabled or inline validation error shown when qty=0.
bugs.actual: Add to cart button remains enabled with qty=0. No validation error displayed. The spinbutton has min=1 attribute but it is not enforced to block the submission UI.

bugs.title: Bulk Order: Duplicate SKU entries create separate cart lines instead of coalescing (BL-CART-007)
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Cart page shows exactly 1 row for the SKU (no duplicate lines)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Clear cart. 3. Navigate to /bulk-order (Copy&Paste). 4. Enter 'ALCE0128,2\nALCE0128,2\nALCE0128,2'. 5. Click Add to cart. 6. Navigate to /cart.
bugs.expected: Cart shows exactly 1 line item for ALCE0128 with quantity 6 (2+2+2 coalesced per BL-CART-007).
bugs.actual: Cart shows 2 separate line items for ALCE0128. Duplicate SKU entries from bulk order are NOT coalesced server-side. BL-CART-007 violated.

bugs.title: Bulk Order: No CSV file upload option on /bulk-order page
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] File upload area or button visible on bulk order page
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order. 3. Inspect both Copy&Paste and Manually tabs for file upload controls.
bugs.expected: A drag-and-drop zone or file picker button is available for uploading a CSV file with SKU/quantity pairs.
bugs.actual: No file upload UI exists on the page. Only Copy&Paste textarea and Manually row-entry modes available.

bugs.title: Bulk Order Manually Tab: No SKU autocomplete suggestions
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Autocomplete dropdown appears after typing 3+ characters
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order, Manually tab. 3. Type 'XKC' in row 1 SKU field and wait 2 seconds.
bugs.expected: Autocomplete dropdown with matching product suggestions appears after 3+ characters.
bugs.actual: No dropdown, no typeahead, no suggestion list. Field accepts freeform text only.

bugs.title: Bulk Order: No error feedback for invalid/non-existent SKU in Manually tab
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Error message displayed for non-existent SKU
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Navigate to /bulk-order, Copy&Paste tab. 3. Enter 'INVALID_SKU_999,1'. 4. Click Add to cart.
bugs.expected: Clear error message shown: 'Product not found' or 'SKU not found' for the invalid entry.
bugs.actual: No error shown. Invalid SKU silently discarded. Same behavior observed in Manually tab — no real-time validation error for unrecognized SKUs.
